title: 11889_Addressing_Misspecification_in_Simulation-based_Inference_through_Data-driven_Calibration
positive_examples: The algorithm addresses model misspecification in simulation-based inference, which can improve the reliability of scientific research and policy decisions.
Promising properties of the algorithm include uncertainty quantification, which can enhance decision-making in scientific fields.
negative_examples: The application of the algorithm to scientific domains may have societal or ethical implications, particularly when informing research or policy decisions.
There is a risk of over-selling the benefits of the algorithm to practitioners without fully understanding its reliability and the impact of core assumption violations.
